theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h0 : P 0) (h1 : ∀ n, (∀ m, P m) → P (n + 1)) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih =>
    cases n with
    | zero => exact h0
    | succ n =>
      apply h1
      intro m hm
      apply ih
      e
after_snippet:

theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h0 : P 0) (h1 : ∀ n, (∀ m, m < n → P m) → P n) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih =>
    cases n with
    | zero => exact h0
    | succ n =>
      apply h1
      intro m hm
      apply ih m hm
